purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.
source: raw/sources/Guía Médica Nacional Profesiones Médicas y Paramedicas, Servicio Nacional de Salud, Santiago, Chile, July 1959, First Edition.pdf
no_visual_regions_reason: The only visual element is a small decorative star, which does not meet the criteria for cropping as it is a minor decorative mark and its content is fully captured by transcription.
